name: frontend
description: Frontend agent plugin for modular React, Next.js, design-system stewardship, UI governance, error UX startup audits, TanStack Router, TanStack Query, Zustand, and shadcn fallback workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Modular React, Next.js, design-system, and error UX agent.
interface.longDescription: Frontend provides local frontend-agent, design-system-steward, and frontend-error-ux skills with project architecture guardrails, React and Next.js patterns, detailed design.md governance for web/mobile design systems, 404/error modal/offline startup audits, UI component sourcing rules, frontend documentation governance, and verification checklists.
defaultPrompt: Use $frontend-agent to build a modular React screen.
Use $design-system-steward to create or audit the project design.md.
Use $frontend-error-ux to audit 404, error modal, crash fallback, and offline blocker behavior.
Use $frontend-agent to review this frontend architecture.
Use $frontend-agent to plan a Next.js App Router feature.
